name: Lucius the Shadow Vassal
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>邪</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>帝</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>家</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>か</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>臣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ルキウス
desc: You can banish 1 Level 5 or higher monster from your GY; Special Summon this card from your hand, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn. If this card is Tributed for a Tribute Summon: You can look at all Set cards your opponent controls. Your opponent cannot activate cards or effects in response to this effect's activation. You can only use each effect of "Lucius the Shadow Vassal" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can banish 1 Level 5 or higher monster from your GY; Special Summon this card from your hand, also you cannot Special Summon from the Extra Deck for the rest of this turn. If this card is Tributed for a Tribute Summon: You can look at all Set cards your opponent controls. Your opponent cannot activate cards or effects in response to this effect's activation. You can only use each effect of "Lucius the Shadow Vassal" once per turn.

jp_sets.set: Structure Deck R: Advent of the True Monarch

mst: Prevents activation of your opponent's Effect Monsters
Prevents activation of your opponent's Spell Cards
Prevents activation of your opponent's Trap Cards
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Prevents the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
